event_inherited() bCanDealDamage=false bCanTakeDamage=false image_speed=0 bInfected=0
//Enemy base statistics eName="Facility Camera" eLevel=31 maxLife=550 life=maxLife pointWorth=47 atkPower=9 resType[1]=2 resType[2]=4 resType[5]=2 stunResist=15 baseItemChance=65 baseDropIndex=90 moneyWorth=5 dieEffect=0
shotTime=30 shotDelay=45 triShot=1
bIsBoss=1 chaoText="At least when it's infected, you can destroy them... Because they're creepy." devText="The big idea of this level wasn't just the enemies getting infected, but also having the Virus being able to change parts of the environment." extraInfo="Can close security doors."
deathAnim=0
myInfectSpot=instance_create(x,y,oInfectMe) myInfectSpot.myOwner=id
